Requirement: POST /api/auth/token/ with valid credentials returns 200 and token
GET /api/books/ with valid token returns 200 and list payload
GET /api/books/<id>/ with valid token returns correct book fields
GET /api/authors/ with valid token returns 200 and list payload
GET /api/authors/<id>/ with valid token returns correct author fields
GET /api/book-instances/ with valid token returns 200 and list payload
GET /api/book-instances/<id>/ with valid token returns correct fields including is_overdue
GET /api/genres/ with valid token returns 200 and list payload
GET /api/genres/<id>/ with valid token returns correct genre fields
GET /api/languages/ with valid token returns 200 and list payload
GET /api/languages/<id>/ with valid token returns correct language fields
GET /api/stats/ with valid token returns 200 and all expected count keys
